llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/me.summary: Bidirectional translator between the Anthropic Messages format and OpenAI chat completions for non-streaming calls, mapping system prompts, multimodal user content, assistant tool calls, tool definitions and tool_choice in both directions.
llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/me.languageNotes: Each Anthropic message can fan out to several OpenAI messages, so the mappers return arrays and the caller flattens them.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/me.summary: Local addition: translates Anthropic Messages requests to the OpenAI Responses API and converts both the complete result and the streamed event sequence back into Anthropic responses and SSE events.
llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/me.languageNotes: The streaming side is a small state machine: it tracks open content blocks so partial deltas from /responses become well-formed Anthropic block start/delta/stop events.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/me.summary: Hono router for the Anthropic-compatible surface, mounting POST /v1/messages and POST /v1/messages/count_tokens behind the shared error forwarder.
Converts OpenAI chat-completion stream chunks into the Anthropic SSE event sequence, opening and closing text and tool_use content blocks as deltas arrive.
llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/me.languageNotes: Anthropic requires explicit content_block_start/stop framing that OpenAI chunks lack, so the translator carries mutable stream state across chunks.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/me.summary: Maps OpenAI finish_reason values onto the equivalent Anthropic stop_reason strings.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/mo.summary: Hono router serving GET /models, reshaping the cached Copilot catalog into the OpenAI model-list format and lazily populating the cache on a cold hit.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/to.summary: Hono router exposing the current Copilot bearer token for local tooling that needs to call Copilot directly.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/us.summary: Hono router serving the Copilot quota snapshot consumed by the browser-based usage viewer.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/server.ts.summary: Builds the Hono application: logging middleware, CORS scoped to /usage only, and every route mounted under both bare and /v1 prefixes plus the Anthropic /v1/messages surface.
llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/server.ts.languageNotes: CORS is deliberately mounted on /usage/* rather than globally, so a web page cannot read /token and harvest the live Copilot bearer token.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/services/.summary: HTTP client for Copilot's /chat/completions endpoint, setting vision and initiator headers from the payload and returning either a parsed response or an SSE event iterator.
HTTP client for Copilot's /embeddings endpoint with the request and response payload types.

Local addition: HTTP client for Copilot's OpenAI Responses endpoint, mirroring the chat-completions client's auth and vision handling but posting to /responses and defining the Responses payload, result and stream-event types.
llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/services/.languageNotes: Sets X-Initiator to agent when the input already carries assistant or tool output, which is how Copilot distinguishes agent turns from user turns.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/services/.summary: Fetches the Copilot model catalog and defines the model metadata types (capabilities, limits, vendor) used across routing and reporting.
Resolves the current VS Code release version from the public update API, falling back to a pinned constant when the lookup fails.
Exchanges the stored GitHub OAuth token for a short-lived Copilot API token and its refresh interval.
Fetches the account's Copilot quota snapshots (premium interactions, chat, completions) from the GitHub API and types the quota payload.
Starts the GitHub OAuth device flow, returning the device code, user code and verification URL to display to the operator.
Fetches the authenticated GitHub user so the CLI can confirm which account the stored token belongs to.
Polls GitHub's OAuth token endpoint at the advertised interval until the operator approves the device code, then returns the access token.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/start.ts.summary: Citty subcommand `start`: parses server options, initialises proxy support, acquires GitHub and Copilot tokens, warms the model and VS Code caches, then serves the Hono app and optionally prints a shell env script.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/tests/anthrop.summary: Verifies that Anthropic request payloads translate into valid OpenAI chat-completion requests, covering system prompts, multimodal content, tool definitions and tool_choice variants.
Verifies the response direction: complete OpenAI responses and streamed chunks must translate into well-formed Anthropic responses and SSE event sequences.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/tests/create-.summary: Checks the chat-completions client's request construction, including the vision and initiator headers derived from payload contents.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/routes/me.summary: Converts a complete Anthropic Messages payload into the OpenAI chat-completions request shape, including model name, messages, tools and tool_choice.
Converts a complete OpenAI chat-completion response back into an Anthropic response, rebuilding text and tool_use content blocks and the usage totals.
Splits an Anthropic assistant turn into the OpenAI assistant message plus the separate tool messages that OpenAI expects.
Translates an Anthropic user turn, promoting tool_result blocks into standalone OpenAI tool messages and mapping image blocks to data URLs.
Maps Anthropic's tool_choice variants (auto, any, tool, none) onto the OpenAI equivalents.
Builds an OpenAI Responses payload from an Anthropic Messages request, mapping the system prompt to instructions and flattening messages into input items.
Converts a complete Responses result into an Anthropic response, rebuilding text, thinking and tool_use blocks along with usage totals.
Creates the mutable state the Responses stream translator carries across chunks to track open content blocks.
Turns a single Responses SSE event into the corresponding Anthropic events, opening and closing text, thinking and tool_use blocks as the stream progresses.
Clamps the user identifier to the length the Responses API accepts, preserving per-user grouping instead of dropping the field.
Emits the Anthropic event sequence for one OpenAI stream chunk, managing message_start, content block framing and tool-call argument accumulation.
Wraps a thrown error as an Anthropic error SSE event so failures mid-stream stay in protocol.
Translates an OpenAI finish_reason into the matching Anthropic stop_reason.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/services/.summary: Posts the OpenAI-shaped payload to Copilot, deriving vision and agent-initiator headers, and returns a parsed result or an SSE event stream.
Posts the Responses-shaped payload to Copilot's /responses endpoint and returns either the parsed result or an SSE event stream.
Posts an embedding request to Copilot and returns the vector response.
Retrieves the Copilot model catalog using the current Copilot token.
Queries the VS Code update endpoint for the latest stable version, returning a pinned fallback on failure.
Calls GitHub's Copilot token endpoint to mint a short-lived API token from the stored OAuth credential.
Retrieves the Copilot quota snapshot for the authenticated account.
Requests a device and user code pair to begin the GitHub OAuth device flow.
Returns the GitHub account associated with the stored OAuth token.
Repeatedly polls GitHub for the device-flow access token, honouring the advertised interval until the operator authorises the request.

llm_cli/vendor/copilot-api/src/start.ts:.summary: Full server bootstrap: applies enterprise and proxy settings, ensures paths, acquires both tokens, warms caches, then binds the Hono app to the configured port.
